annotation.text: I'm not sure I understand this one very well. I tend to use plan mode when I want to prevent the agent from leaping into action before we have fully understood the shape of the problem we trying to solve and/or the path forward to a solution.
annotation.anchor: (2) The plan-mode proxy. Operators leaning on "plan mode" or chain-of-thought to surface assumptions before action. Data: 68 PROCESS corrections, dominant shape "are you delegating?" / "you are the orchestrator, not the implementation team". A plan in response to a directive inherits the directive's hidden assumptions; it doesn't reveal them.
